creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 207450
patch for print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr

Version 1.7.3 was appeared in 2019-08-30.

There are no program changes that affect behavior.
${WRKSRC}/COPYING has changed. It will be installed as a license file.
Some copyright lines have been deleted.
New PPDs has been added.

1.7.0 (2019-07-25)
Privacy Statement is applied. (COPYING has changed.)
PPD file for EP-712A series, EP-812A series and EW-052A series were added.

1.7.1 (2019-08-09)
PPD file for XP-3100 series was added.

1.7.2 (2019-08-19)
PPD file for WF-110 series was added.

1.7.3 (2019-08-30)
PPD file for WF-2810 series is added.
